title: SLO (5m)
description: Measured compliance ratio per declared SLI/SLO/SLA for the selected pipeline and lane. One series per (sli, name, kind). Series auto-discovered from ingestion_slo_target_ratio — supply $pipeline and $lane only.

targets.expr: sum by (pipeline, lane, sli, le) (increase({__name__=~"ingestion_sli_.*_ms_histogram_bucket", pipeline="$pipeline", lane="$lane"}[5m])) / ignoring(le) group_left sum by (pipeline, lane, sli) (increase({__name__=~"ingestion_sli_.*_ms_histogram_bucket", pipeline="$pipeline", lane="$lane", le="+Inf"}[5m])) * on (pipeline, lane, sli, le) group_left (name, kind) ingestion_slo_target_ratio{pipeline="$pipeline", lane="$lane"}
